titleStmt.title: SII 30.169: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 169. (A.R. No. 247 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyār Taluk, North Arcot District. Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the south wall Rājādhiraja-Chōḻa: year 33: 1051 A.D.

summary.p: Built in at the end. Begins with the praśasti, tiṅgaḷēr taru. It records the sale of 3549 kuḻi of land as maḍapuṟam to the maṭha called Pavithramāṇikka maḍam located in the premises of the Śrī Pōndaiyāṇḍār temple. The land was also freed from other taxes and declared as iṟaiyili. They also agreed not to levy any tax from the cultivators. The madhyastha of the village Sri Pōndai Ādichaṇḍēsvara perumāḷ figures as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer taru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kiḻ nilamakaṇilava malarmakaṭppuṇarntu ceṅkolocci karuṅkalika
ṭintu tantaiyar tamayar tampiyar taṉtiru maintareṉṟivarai maṇimuṭi cūṭṭik kaṉṉikāvalar teṉṉavar
mūvaruḷ vāṉakam Iruvarukkaruḷik kāṉakam Oruvaṉukkaḷittup porucilaic ceralaṉ velaikeḻu kāntaḷurc cālai kalama
ṟuttaruḷi Ilaṅkaiyark karacaiyum Alaṅkal vallapaṉaiyum kaṉṉakucciyar kāvalaṉai yum po
ṉṉaṇi muṭittalai taṭintu taṉkoṭippaṭai Ēvik kaṉṉāṭakar viṭukaṭakari puraḷat taṉṉāṭaiyiṟ ṟamiḻp paraṇi
koṇṭoṉṉār vaccira neṭuvāḷ viccayaṉ veruvineḷittu Añci Ōṭat taṉ vañciyam paṭaiyāl Āṅkavan pitāvai
mātāvo ṭum catarmali viṅkunirp pūṇṭur veñcamat takappaṭuttu [ayappaṭai Āhavamallaṉ payat]
toṭum varaviṭum Oṟṟarai veruvarap piṭittu Āṅkavar mārpilāhava mallaṉ yāṅṅaṉam Añciṉaṉ Eṉṉa naṉke
ḻutic celutti taṉ pulikkoṭip paṭaiñar Oṭṭa varivāraṇavaracaik kaṭalpuraic ciṟutuṟaip peruntuṟait teyva
vimaraciyeṉṟu Uṟutuṟai muṉṟilum Uyarpuṉalūṭṭi Āṅkavaṉettak kiriyile caṅku kayale
ḻuti Uyar jayattampam Eḻilpeṟa niṟuttit taṉkaḻal paṇintoḻu kumaraicaroṭu ceṉṟāṭip
porupuli virakkoṭiyoṭu tiyākakkoṭi yeṭuttoṉṉalar kavarnta toṉṉeti
ṉokki tuyarviṉillavaṉviṭu taṇṭattukku Avaṉ velpuravi nuḷampaṉum kāḷitācaṉum viḷamparum tārc
cāmuṇṭaṉum pork kommaiyyaṉum villavarayaṉum mutaliyāṉa palarum tirintu
Uppaḷar koymalar pacuntalai tarāta tayilappaṉ taṭintu muṉkoṇṭu takaivaṉa tappaimuṉ Appakai
cekuttuppaḷaṉ vaḻiyiṟ tappiya varacar Āṅkatu mīṭka māṭṭātu taṉatu pūṅkaḻal caraṇenap pukkavarkkaruḷit taṭamuṭi
mīṭṭuk kuṭuttu muṭikka tiruttaṭaṅkavaṉatappaiyaip paṟittuṭaṉ koṇṭu
Iraṭṭapāṭi yerimaṭuvittu viraṭṭam Eḻarai Ilakkamum cevvitāṇṭu vicuvalokattu viḷaṅki maṉuneṟi niṉ
ṟaśvametañcey taraicuviṟṟirun=ta jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa nuyarn=ta perumpukaḻ kovirāja
śrīrājādhirājadevaṟkku yāṇṭu 3 10 3 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭalattu tāmark koṭṭattu
coḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakka ḷom Ivvūr neṟkoṭṭa
śrīpontaiyāṇṭār koyilil pavittiramāṇikka maṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka Ātidāsacaṇṭeśvaradevar
maṭattukku maṭappuṟamāka viṭṭa nilamāvatu Ivvūr śrīmaturāntaka ttukkup poṉak kīḻmūlaimaṭaiyil
viṭṭa nilam Oṭṭaittūmpu śrīrāmavāykkālukku vaṭakkum pattāṅkaṇṇāṟu
ṇiyiṉ tirukkāḷappeṟṟu pūmikku kiḻakku Āṟām viti bhāratuvāji tiruveṅkaṭakiramavittaṉ ti
kkum kiḻakku kaṭaiyavum varicaiyum taram peṟātu kiṭan=ta kollaiyuṅ kuḻiyum kāṇiyu(m)māṉa nilattil
tu nāṉūṟu Iṅke patinorāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟum Iraṇṭām viti nāraṇabhaṭṭa kiramavittan
ttu Aypatum Itanukku vaṭakku paṉniraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Añcām viti māṅkāṭṭu tirumāṟpeṟṟu kā
cceri maṇaṟpā kkattu tirumantracālai kiramavittan pirāmaṇiyum nālām viti yār tevikkum
viti nāmpāttu śrīponntaikkiramavittaṉ pūmikku kiḻakkum teṟku paṉniraṇṭāṅkaṇṇāṟṟukku
m Āka kaṇṇāṟu muṉ nāl kuḻi muvāyirattu Aññūṟṟu nāṟpattoṉpatiṉ kuḻiyum Āka ko
ṇṭu Ikkollai nilam vilaikkuṭukka Enṟu sapaiyuḷ Eḻu kuṇṭur mātavakkirama
vāmana paṭṭanum Āṟṟūr cūriyatevakkāṭaka comāciyānum viṟṟuk kuṭukka veṉṟu paṇikka
kkuṭuttom māhāsabhaip peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom Innilañcuṭṭi tirukoṟṟavāḷ koṟṟu
Epperppaṭṭatu Innila cuṭṭi koḷḷak kuṭutto(m)mākavum Innilam Āyin=tarakālamRead- ācantirakālamIṟaiyiliyā
mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom Innilam Uḻukuṭikaḷai nir viḷaikkum Uḻaviṟai
māṭṭu māyirattoṉṟu koḷḷappeṟātomākavum Ipparicu viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu kuṭuttom pe
rumakkaḷom Ivarkaḷ paṇikka paṇikeṭṭu Eḻutineṉ Ivvūr madhyastaṉeṉ śrīpontai Āticaṇṭeśvaraperumā
ḷeṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu yāṇṭu 3 10 4 [nāḷ ] Ivai maṇṭapatte kūṭṭakkuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiru m
Digital edition of SII 30.169 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
